title: fix: enforce audio route access parity
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Sound check
gist.blurb: We've tuned up our audio routes to share the same reliable access and budget checks as our text and image models. Fairer usage means better stability for everyone making noise!
gist.summary: Unified the access controls and budget checks for audio generation routes to match the rest of the API.
gist.impact: Audio generation now correctly respects API key budgets, model permissions, and balance gating, ensuring fairer usage across the platform.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a friendly ticket-checker or conductor for audio requests, representing the new unified access and budget checks for the audio API.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones and holding a small clipboard, standing next to a glowing retro speaker and a small wooden gate. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
